description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a fenced yard. The front facade features a small porch area, two trees, and a concrete driveway leading to the side of the house. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area, and a grassy lawn with a few trees and shrubs. Large windows line the rear of the house, providing ample natural light and a view of the pool. The property is enclosed by a white fence, and the landscaping is simple with a mix of grass, concrete, and minimal decorative elements. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light exterior, front porch, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, two trees, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, driveway, and partial view of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, the swimming pool, patio, and a tree in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, grassy area, and the back of the house with minimal windows.
